english translation text: Kerbala Taazim kar, aai bahan Shabbir kiOh Karbala, show respect, the sister of Imam Hussain (a.s.) has arrivedEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Kerbala Taazim kar, aai bahan Shabbir kiJaake kadmose lipat, tu Zainab-e-dilgeer ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh Karbala, show respect, the sister of Imam Hussain (a.s) has arrived
Fall to her feet and embrace the grief-stricken Zainab (a.s)

urdu transliteration text:
Kabr se be sar bahattar, tan uthe taazim koDekh istekbaal ko hay, Furaat-o -Shamshir bhi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
From the grave, 72 headless bodies rise in respect,
Look, even the River Euphrates is waiting to receive her

urdu transliteration text:
Baapke hatho pe hay, Masum Agher tishnalabDekh ab tak hay nishani, Hurmala ke tir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
In the arms of his father, lay the innocent and thirsty baby Asghar,
Look, you can still see the wound left by Hurmala's arrow

urdu transliteration text:
Kaidse chhutker hai aata, kaafela zawwar kaPuchhle unse sitam, zindaan ki jaagir ka
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Having been freed from captivity, the caravan of pilgrims is arriving,
Ask them of the atrocities they faced in the prisons

urdu transliteration text:
Kaale mehmil me hai baithi, bibiya sab dukh jailDaagose chhalni jigar hai, Shaah ke hamshir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Sitting in black canopies (on the backs of camels), are the grief stricken ladies,
Bibi Zainab’s heart is pierced with the pain of Imam Hussain (a.s)

urdu transliteration text:
Kaid hoker jab chalithi, sarpe chaadar bhi na thi Sar khule bazzar me thi waarise Tathir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When imprisoned, the ladies were without their veils,
Paraded bareheaded in the bazaar were the inheritors of the most pure ones (referred to in Ayah Tathir)

urdu transliteration text:
Laash tha begor bhai, ka bahen sar nange  thiBhai hay ab kabr  mei, parde mei hay hamsheer bhi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The brother’s body lay without a shroud, the sister was without her veil,
The brother is now buried and the sister has got her veil back

urdu transliteration text:
Aj tak roneki bewon, ko ijazat bhi nathiAb rihaai milgayi, hogi aza shabbir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Up until now the womenfolk were not even permitted to cry,
Now that they have been freed, they will wholeheartedly mourn the martyrs of Karbala
How will you bear to hear the sorrowful cries of this baby’s mother

urdu transliteration text:
Maadare Akber bhi aati, hai kaleja thaam karWo gilaa kisse kare, ruthi hui takdir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Approaching with a hand on her heart, is the devastated mother of Ali Akber, With whom can this poor mother share her pain and grief

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Sakina ko na dhundho, turbate Abbas parReh gayi hai Shaam me, wo laadli Shabbir ki
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Don't look for Sakina near the grave of Abbas (a.s.),
That beloved daughter of Imam Hussain (a.s) is left in Shaam
